items.title: Amazon SQS
items.description: Amazon SQS for DVA-C02 — standard vs FIFO queues, visibility timeout, message retention, DLQ, long polling, delay queues, and Lambda integration via Event Source Mapping. Key exam patterns covered.

items.title: Message Queues & Streaming
items.description: Guide to asynchronous messaging systems including Kafka, RabbitMQ, SQS, event sourcing, pub/sub patterns, consumer groups, ordering guarantees, and exactly-once semantics.
